buildCommand: npm run build:frontend && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
